name: Chiz
description: Cosmos striker tied to City Tycoon—earn him through the city mode rather than the banner, then enjoy a patient, daily rhythm that rewards showing up for your town.

seo.title: Chiz — Attack
seo.description: Chiz is a Cosmos attacker unlocked via City Tycoon in NTE—approachable damage dealer with a cozy progression loop for F2P and new accounts.
